text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Now everyone will know how amazing you are!
Now everyone will know how amazing you are!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Now everyone will know how amazing you are!
Now everyone will know how amazing you are!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
To encourage Narita Taishin, I say that<n>if she
keeps winning, it'll be<n>impossible for people not to
be<n>impressed by her. But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, you just ruined the moment.<n>Thanks a lot.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I cringed so hard when I saw you<n>grinning like a
fool.
choice_data_list: You won! Of course I'm going to be happy!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna get changed and head<n>back.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin sounds fed up with me,<n>but I can
discern a little spring in her<n>step as she goes off.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm not weak! I'm the fastest of all of<n>them!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What's with that creepy smirk?<n>Knock it off.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Good for you. Doesn't matter to me if<n>you're
happy or not, though.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I win these races for myself.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As she makes that declaration, I'm<n>struck once
again by her<n>determination to win.
